mapper.sql: select doc_id, kb_id, doc_name, doc_type, file_path, file_size, dify_document_id, dify_batch, indexing_status, word_count, hit_count, enabled, status, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark from ai_knowledge_document
mapper.select: select doc_id, kb_id, doc_name, doc_type, content, file_path, file_size, dify_document_id, dify_batch, indexing_status, word_count, hit_count, enabled, status, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark from ai_knowledge_document where doc_id = #{docId} and del_flag = '0'
mapper.insert:
insert into ai_knowledge_document
kb_id, doc_name, doc_type, content, file_path, file_size, dify_document_id, dify_batch, indexing_status, word_count, hit_count, enabled, status, create_by, remark, create_time
#{kbId}, #{docName}, #{docType}, #{content}, #{filePath}, #{fileSize}, #{difyDocumentId}, #{difyBatch}, #{indexingStatus}, #{wordCount}, #{hitCount}, #{enabled}, #{status}, #{createBy}, #{remark}, sysdate()
mapper.delete: update ai_knowledge_document set del_flag = '1' where doc_id = #{docId}

update ai_knowledge_document set del_flag = '1' where doc_id in
#{docId}
update ai_knowledge_document set del_flag = '1' where kb_id = #{kbId}
mapper.select: select doc_id, kb_id, doc_name, doc_type, content, file_path, file_size, dify_document_id, dify_batch, indexing_status, word_count, hit_count, enabled, status, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark from ai_knowledge_document where kb_id = #{kbId} and del_flag = '0' and enabled = '1' order by create_time desc
select count(*) from ai_knowledge_document where kb_id = #{kbId} and del_flag = '0'

select doc_id, kb_id, doc_name, doc_type, file_path, file_size, dify_document_id, indexing_status, word_count, enabled, status from ai_knowledge_document where dify_document_id = #{difyDocumentId} and del_flag = '0' limit 1
